name: golang-github-azure-azure-storage-blob-go-dev
title: golang-github-azure-azure-storage-blob-go-dev
summary: Microsoft Azure Blob Storage Library for Go
description:
Microsoft Azure Blob Storage Library for Go
The Microsoft Azure Storage SDK for Go allows you to build applications
that takes advantage of Azure's scalable cloud storage. It provides
low-level and high-level APIs.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-azure-azure-storage-blob-go-dev because Microsoft Azure Blob Storage Library for Go.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-azure-azure-storage-blob-go-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-azure-azure-storage-blob-go-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-azure-azure-storage-blob-go-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
